SMILE AESTHETICS - DESIGN GUIDELINE
SECTION 1 — HERO
Layout
Hero đơn giản.
Desktop:
● Text bên trái
● Hình ảnh bên phải
Mobile:
● Text trên
● Hình dưới
Khoảng trắng rộng.
Không sử dụng background quá phức tạp.
Website Copy
Smile Aesthetics
A smile does not need to be perfect.
It is the one that feels most natural and complements your appearance.
Whether you are looking for a subtle improvement or a more noticeable change, the first step is understanding what matters most to you.
Primary CTA
Share Your Photos
Secondary CTA
Discuss Your Situation
Primary Media
Không dùng:
● smile makeover quá đà
● veneer trắng sáng bất thường
● ảnh tạo cảm giác "Instagram smile"
Ưu tiên:
● bệnh nhân cười tự nhiên
● ảnh chân dung bán thân
● biểu cảm tự tin nhưng không tạo dáng quá nhiều

Layout
Grid cards.
Desktop:
3 x 2
Mobile:
2 x 3 hoặc stacked
Website Copy
◌ Tooth color
◌ Tooth shape
◌ Small chips or worn edges
◌ Gaps between teeth
◌ Alignment concerns
◌ Overall smile appearance
Primary Media
Mỗi card:
● icon tối giản
hoặc
● hình minh họa line-art
Không dùng:

● hình điều trị
SECTION 3 — EVERY SMILE IS DIFFERENT
Layout
Bố cục 2 cột.
Bên trái: Headline + Intro
Bên phải: 5 factors cards
Website Copy
Aesthetic planning may consider:
✓ Facial features
✓ Smile characteristics
✓ Oral health
✓ Personal preferences
✓ Long-term considerations
The best cosmetic result is not always the whitest, straightest, or most dramatic. The aim is to create a result that looks natural, balanced, and appropriate for each person.
Primary Media
Bộ ảnh consultation.
Ví dụ:
● bác sĩ trao đổi với bệnh nhân
● smile design discussion
● digital scan review
● facial analysis
Supporting Media
Có thể sử dụng:
● smile design mockup
● digital smile planning
● intraoral scan
SECTION 4 — WHAT OPTIONS MAY BE AVAILABLE?
Layout
Treatment cards.
Desktop:
3 x 2
Mobile:
stacked
Website Copy
Teeth Whitening
Brightening the appearance of teeth affected by staining or discoloration.
Veneers
Improving the shape, color, and overall appearance of visible teeth.
Cosmetic Bonding
Correcting small chips, gaps, or minor imperfections with tooth-colored materials.
Orthodontics
Improving tooth alignment and smile balance through gradual tooth movement.
Restorative Enhancements
Enhancing both appearance and function when teeth are worn, damaged, or previously restored.
Other Cosmetic Procedures
Additional options based on individual concerns and aesthetic goals.
Primary Media
6 treatment cards.
Mỗi card gồm:
● icon
● treatment name
● 1-line description

The exact process depends on your situation and the improvements being explored.
Primary Media
Visual timeline graphic.
Không dùng ảnh điều trị.
SECTION 6 — CONSIDERING ORTHODONTICS?
Layout
Bố cục 2 cột.
Bên trái:
Text
Bên phải:
Orthodontic journey visual
Website Copy
Traditional orthodontic treatment often requires regular follow-up visits over an extended period of time.
For some overseas Vietnamese and international patients, this can be difficult to coordinate.
In certain situations, Invisalign may provide greater flexibility while still allowing progress to be monitored appropriately.
CTA
Learn More About Orthodontics
Primary Media
Ví dụ:
Consultation
↓
Digital Scan
↓
Aligners
↓
Progress Monitoring
Supporting Media
Có thể sử dụng:
● Invisalign simulation
● digital scan
● aligner trays
● progress review
